channel.title: Application Insights on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Application Insights on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Application Insights Auto-instrumentation for Azure Kubernetes Service apps
item.description:
Azure Monitor Application Insights auto-instrumentation for Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) apps is now generally available. It lets you monitor applications without changing source code, using only a few configuration steps.

  • Source: Azure Updates
